Notes: Concordia-St. Paul winning streak snapped at 13 games
Concordia ranked #5 in NCAA Central Region ... Northern State #6 in Region
NSU's Emily Becken scores all 23 of her game-high points in 2nd half
Game.Officials: Jared Butson,  Kent Otte,  MJ Wagenson
